languages.text: {n}Голос манипулуса внезапно проседает на несколько тонов, наливаясь угрожающим гулом.{/n} "Омниссия, единый в истинах, да поразит Движущая Сила твоя зло, да искоренит источник его..." {n}Катушки в массивном аугментированном животе Эоганна трещат в такт словам молитвы.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Голос манипулуса внезапно проседает на несколько тонов, наливаясь угрожающим гулом.{/n} "Омниссия, единый в истинах, да поразит Движущая Сила твоя зло, да искоренит источник его..." {n}Катушки в массивном аугментированном животе Эоганна трещат в такт словам молитвы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous hum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous hum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De repente, la voz del manipulus se vuelve octavas más grave y vibra con un canturreo siniestro.{/n} «Omnissiah, único en la verdad, que Tu Fuerza Motriz aplaste el mal y extirpe la fuente de esta indignidad...». {n}Las bobinas del núcleo aumentado de Eogunn zumban al ritmo de la oración.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De repente, la voz del manipulus se vuelve octavas más grave y vibra con un canturreo siniestro.{/n} «Omnissiah, único en la verdad, que Tu Fuerza Motriz aplaste el mal y extirpe la fuente de esta indignidad...». {n}Las bobinas del núcleo aumentado de Eogunn zumban al ritmo de la oración.{/n}

languages.text: {n}突然，操纵者的声音降了好几个八度，发出不祥的低沉嗡鸣声。{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚，唯一真理之主，愿您的源力粉碎邪恶，将其根源彻底拔除……”{n}伊奥贡那重度改造的核心中内置的线圈，伴随着祷词的节奏发出低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}突然，操纵者的声音降了好几个八度，发出不祥的低沉嗡鸣声。{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚，唯一真理之主，愿您的源力粉碎邪恶，将其根源彻底拔除……”{n}伊奥贡那重度改造的核心中内置的线圈，伴随着祷词的节奏发出低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Plötzlich wird die Stimme des Manipulus' mehrere Oktaven tiefer und ist von einem unheilvollen Dröhnen erfüllt.{/n} "Omnissiah, einzig Wahrer, möge deine Antriebskraft das Böse zerschmettern und seinen Ursprung entwurzeln ..." {n}Die in Eogunns augmentierten Kern eingebauten Spulen stimmen summend in das Gebet ein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Plötzlich wird die Stimme des Manipulus' mehrere Oktaven tiefer und ist von einem unheilvollen Dröhnen erfüllt.{/n} "Omnissiah, einzig Wahrer, möge deine Antriebskraft das Böse zerschmettern und seinen Ursprung entwurzeln ..." {n}Die in Eogunns augmentierten Kern eingebauten Spulen stimmen summend in das Gebet ein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soudain, la voix du manipulus baisse de plusieurs octaves, vibrant au diapason d'un grondement sinistre.{/n} « Omnimessie, seul détenteur des vérités sacrées, puisse Votre Force Motrice écraser le mal et en éliminer définitivement la source... » {n}Les bobines intégrées au noyau lourdement augmenté d'Eogunn vrombissent au rythme de sa prière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soudain, la voix du manipulus baisse de plusieurs octaves, vibrant au diapason d'un grondement sinistre.{/n} « Omnimessie, seul détenteur des vérités sacrées, puisse Votre Force Motrice écraser le mal et en éliminer définitivement la source... » {n}Les bobines intégrées au noyau lourdement augmenté d'Eogunn vrombissent au rythme de sa prière.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Manipülus'un sesi, aniden birkaç oktav düşerek uğursuz bir tıngırtıyla titreşiyor.{/n} "Ey gerçeklerin tek sahibi Hermesih! Devinim Gücü, kötülüğü ezsin ve kaynağını söküp atsın..." {n}Eogunn'un ağır ogmentli çekirdeğine inşa edilmiş bobinler, duayla aynı ritimde uğulduyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus'un sesi, aniden birkaç oktav düşerek uğursuz bir tıngırtıyla titreşiyor.{/n} "Ey gerçeklerin tek sahibi Hermesih! Devinim Gücü, kötülüğü ezsin ve kaynağını söküp atsın..." {n}Eogunn'un ağır ogmentli çekirdeğine inşa edilmiş bobinler, duayla aynı ritimde uğulduyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスの声が数オクターブ低くなり、不吉な振動を帯びる。{/n}「唯一の真実であるオムニシア、御意志の動力で悪を砕き、その根源を根絶してくれ…」{n}エオグンの強化されたコアに組み込まれたコイルが祈りのリズムに合わせて振動する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, the Manipulus's voice drops several octaves,, vibrating with an ominous thrum.{/n} "Omnissiah, sole in truths, may Thy Motive Force crush evil, and may it root out the source thereof..." {n}Coils built into Eogunn's heavily augmented core drone in time with the prayer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マニピュラスの声が数オクターブ低くなり、不吉な振動を帯びる。{/n}「唯一の真実であるオムニシア、御意志の動力で悪を砕き、その根源を根絶してくれ…」{n}エオグンの強化されたコアに組み込まれたコイルが祈りのリズムに合わせて振動する。{/n}
